name: free
description: Free tier models for high-volume swarm passes

models.use_for: High-volume passes with large context — uses direct Google subscription, zero proxy cost
Lightweight high-volume passes — fastest Google model, zero proxy cost

Trillion-param flagship from inclusionAI — #9 code mode, top recommended; complex agentic coding and large context tasks

Tencent MoE with configurable reasoning — #15 code mode; supports disabled/low/high reasoning levels; 262K context
